title: Marilyn Colbert
compiled_truth: Marilyn Colbert is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-11-24 to 2001-11-27), Marilyn Colbert sent 13 and received 448 emails, totalling 461 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (13), [Bill Hare](people/bill-hare) (11), [Susan Bailey](people/susan-bailey) (11), [Bernice Rodriguez](people/bernice-rodriguez) (11), [Debbie Brackett](people/debbie-brackett) (10).
